pr.title: Set app display name to Abhyas and add APK build workflow
pr.body:
Updates the app’s display name to “Abhyas” and adds a GitHub Actions workflow to build a debug APK and publish it as an artifact on pushes to main or manual dispatch.

- **App branding**
  - Update `app_name` to “Abhyas” so the launcher label matches the desired name.
- **CI build & artifact**
  - Add `build-apk.yml` to build the debug APK, rename it to `Abhyas.apk`, and upload it as the `Abhyas` artifact with read-only token permissions.

```yaml
- name: Rename APK
  run: mv app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk Abhyas.apk
```
pr.author: Copilot
